name: claudehut-marketplace
description: ClaudeHut — a 7-phase agentic workflow plugin for Java/Spring Boot backend engineers.

plugins.name: claudehut
plugins.description: 7-phase agentic workflow for Java/Spring Boot backends. Enforces discover → brainstorm → spec → plan → implement → review → learn (over a pre-indexed codebase) with Iron-Law skills, tier-aware action gates, parallel implementers, and per-project memory.
